name: Pizza Rustica ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all dough ingredients in the pan and program for knead and first rise. The dough will be firm and pull away from the side of the machine.
2. While the dough is rising, prepare the filling by whisking together all filling ingredients and refrigerating until ready to assemble the pizza.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F with the rack in the center position.
4. Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
5. When the dough cycle is completed, transfer the dough to a lightly floured work surface, cover it with a clean towel, and let it rest for 5 minutes.
6. Cut the dough into 2 pieces: one piece should be one third of the dough, and the other piece should be two thirds.
7. Roll out the larger piece to a 14-inch circle. Line the springform pan with the circle, allowing a small amount (1") to overlap the top of the pan.
8. Arrange 5 slices of salami on the bottom. Spread a third of the ricotta filling over the salami, then sprinkle a third of the basil.
9. Lay out a third of the peppers. Lay out 4 slices of provolone.
10. Repeat this pattern for the next two layers.
11. Roll out the small piece of dough to a 9-inch circle. Brush water around the rim of the dough already in the pan, then fit the 9-inch circle on top. Trim away about 1/2 inch of the overlapping dough from the bottom circle.
12. Crimp together the top and bottom edges. Brush the top of the dough with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
13. With a pair of scissors, cut a vent in the top crust about 1-inch diameter.
14. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F, then for another 15 minutes at 350°F.
15. Remove the pizza from the oven and immediately remove the sides of the springform. Cool before slicing to allow layers to set.
